design_philosophy: Authority, Clarity, Truth. For a complex SaaS admin tool like a school timetable management system with 60-70 constraints, the design must prioritize data density, functional clarity, and high legibility. The interface acts as a command center. We use sharp contrasts, a strict bento-style 'Control Room' grid, and modular cards to manage the intense data load.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#09090B]

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for dense data, forms, and paragraphs. Center alignment reserved for empty states.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-border), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md), border color darkens.
surface_strategies.header: Solid Background (bg-white) with a hard 1px bottom border (border-border). Must be z-50.
surface_strategies.constraint_builder: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) - Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout for node-based canvas, inspector panel on the right.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary button uses #002FA7 bg. High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0055FF]).
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs. 1px border. Focus state must have higher contrast.
components.tables: Dense rows. Clear headers. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-gray-50/50). Zebra striping optional but subtle.
components.drag_drop_timetable: Grid of days x periods. Draggable teacher-subject cards. Snap-to-grid. Clear drop zones. Real-time clash validation highlights (red border).
components.constraint_builder_ui: Split-view: left/center is graph-based canvas with tokens/chips. Right is inspector panel. Constraint chips represent boolean logic (e.g., Status = Active). Nested groups and draggable tokens.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text color changes (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white). Lighter hue for hover bg.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast ring. e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]
motion_and_interactions.drag_drop: Scale up slightly while dragging (scale-105). Drop target highlights with dashed border.

icons.usage: Use consistently for sidebar nav, table actions, and constraint builder nodes.

hero_background.description: Abstract background for a school administration SaaS web app, featuring a sleek, minimalist data grid layout. Used in the login or landing page.

school_building.description: Image of a school building, can be used in the school dashboard settings or header.

teacher_profiles.description: Indian teacher portrait 1, use for teacher master grid or mock profiles.
Indian teacher portrait 2, use for teacher master grid.
Indian teacher portrait 3, use for teacher master grid.

students_activities.description: Group of children taking picture, use for activity rooms or school profile.
Shallow focus photo of girl holding newspaper, use for library or student sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected Light Theme and Swiss & High-Contrast archetype (#4).
Implement the 'Control Room' bento grid for the school dashboard.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for structural layout. Use customized Shadcn for interactive logic.
For the drag and drop Timetable Builder, use a grid layout with snap-to-cell mechanics and visual clash indications (e.g., red highlight for overlaps).
For the Constraint Builder, implement a split-view layout. Use chips/tokens for constraints. Left canvas for dragging and dropping constraint blocks, right panel for inspector settings.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns, table rows).
Use IBM Plex Sans for body text to ensure data grid clarity, and Cabinet Grotesk for headings.
Never use placeholder image services. Rely strictly on the media_and_images provided here.
